action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Sheehan, Joers, McCarville, Anderson, Clancy, Fitzgerald, Stroud, Udell, Arney, Bare, Brown, Emerson, Hysell, Kirsch, Miresse, Ortiz-Velez, Palmeri, Sinicki, Tenorio, Vining and Andraca; 
cosponsored by Senators Keyeski, Larson, Roys, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Hesselbein, Pfaff, Spreitzer, Wirch and Ratcliff
